summary: Extract WorkbenchStore public types into a shared BFF type module.
rationale: WorkbenchStore is a red-zone BFF persistence boundary. This PR preserves the public facade while moving public dataclasses, literal aliases, constants, and errors into a narrower type module so downstream store seams no longer import the facade.
verification: uv run --group dev python -m pytest tests/test_workbench_store_decoupling.py tests/test_workbench_auth_security.py tests/test_workbench_security_audit.py -q
